text: Which of the following is true regarding the maintenance and logging of the Oil Record Book Part II?

options.text: It must be maintained specifically by oil tankers in addition to Part I
It maintains comprehensive details of oil cargo loading and unloading operations
It must be safely retained on board the vessel for at least three years from the last entry

explanation: The Oil Record Book Part II is mandatory for oil tankers to track all cargo and ballast operations involving oil. It must be maintained accurately and kept on board for three years, as it is subject to inspection by port state control.
